name: the-1-page-marketing-plan
description: Direct response marketing skills for small business owners — 13 skills covering target market selection, messaging, offers, advertising, lead capture, nurturing, sales conversion, customer experience, lifetime value, and referrals. Based on Allan Dib's 9-square canvas framework.

skills.name: target-market-selection-pvp-index
skills.description: Use this skill to select the ideal target market or customer segment for a small business using the PVP Index (Personal fulfillment, Value to marketplace, Profitability). Triggers when a user asks to define their niche, pick a target customer, score market segments, or answer who their product is for.

skills.name: marketing-metrics-dashboard
skills.description: Build a marketing metrics dashboard tracking the 7 key numbers every small business must measure: Leads, Conversion Rate, Average Transaction Value (ATV), Break-Even Point, Gross Margin, Churn Rate, and Customer Lifetime Value (CLV).

skills.name: customer-experience-systems-design
skills.description: Design and document the four core business systems (Marketing, Sales, Fulfillment, Administration) and create memorable customer experiences through experience design and innovation.

skills.name: customer-revenue-quality-audit
skills.description: Classify every customer into one of four archetypes — Tribe, Churners, Vampires, or Snow Leopards — score your customer base using Net Promoter Score (NPS), and produce a segmentation report with a concrete fire/grow decision per customer.

skills.name: marketing-message-and-usp-crafting
skills.description: Use this skill to craft a differentiated Unique Selling Proposition (USP), write a Problem/Solution/Proof elevator pitch, and engineer headlines that activate the 5 core emotional buying motivators.

skills.name: irresistible-offer-builder
skills.description: Use this skill to construct a complete, irresistible offer using an 8-element checklist (Value, Language, Reason Why, Value Stack, Upsells, Payment Plan, Outrageous Guarantee, Scarcity).

skills.name: lead-capture-ethical-bribe-design
skills.description: Use this skill to design a lead-capture ad strategy using an ethical bribe — a high-value free offer that self-selects high-probability prospects.

skills.name: customer-lifetime-value-growth
skills.description: Grow Customer Lifetime Value (CLV) using five proven levers — raise prices, upsell at point of purchase, move customers up an ascension ladder, increase purchase frequency through reminders and subscriptions, and win back lapsed customers with a reactivation campaign.

skills.name: referral-system-design
skills.description: Design an active referral system for a small business — covering referral scripts, gift card mechanisms, joint venture partner profiles, and the bystander effect override for referral asks.

skills.name: advertising-media-roi-framework
skills.description: Use when selecting advertising media channels, calculating Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) per channel, deciding whether to stop, measure, or scale each channel, and checking for dangerous single-point-of-failure concentration.

skills.name: lead-nurture-sequence-design
skills.description: Use this skill to design a complete lead nurture system for a small business — covering shock-and-awe packages, drip email sequences, CRM setup, follow-up cadences, and positioning as a trusted advisor before the sale.

skills.name: sales-conversion-trust-system
skills.description: Use when ready to convert nurtured leads into paying customers — covering outrageous guarantees, risk reversal, 3-tier pricing, closing scripts, and post-sale wow experiences.

skills.name: marketing-plan-canvas
skills.description: Use this skill to build, assemble, or audit a complete 9-square 1-Page Marketing Plan canvas for any small or medium business — integrating all upstream skills into a single coherent strategy document.
